search_query: victim identified in Lincoln police shooting
combined_text: Man fatally shot by Lincoln police last month identified Real-Time News from Birmingham Man fatally shot by Lincoln police last month identified Posted on June 13, 2016 at 11:23 AMComment By Carol Robinsoncrobinson@al.com A man shot to death by a Lincoln police officer last month has now been identified. Authorities today identified the man as Dennis Huds
